name: Lucifer
description: Lucifer is the Demon King of Pride, known for being defiant against others. Formerly the first of the Archangels of Heaven and one of the Seven Lively Virtues, she was denounced and cast out of Heaven for her growing pride and rebellion against the will of God. After battling the Seven Mortal Sins for the first time, she is cursed by Belial with the Garb of Punishment, a barbed tattoo-like body-chain empowered by the Seven Sins which torments her with constant pain and blood-letting.

name: Masaki Izawa
description: An experienced boxer who hangs around the streets as a delinquent, called the 'Charisma of the streets'. He supports Yuu in his development as a fighter. He uses his own customized version of Boxing and Karate for street fights.

name: Mashiro Kuna
description: __Height:__ 153 cm (5'0") Mashiro Kuna is the former lieutenant of the 9th Division under Kensei. She is a somewhat ditzy girl who is prone to throwing fits for the smallest of things, such as Orihime befriending Hachi or when Kensei insisted on following his subordinates into battle when they were still in the Gotei 13. name: Mayu Nekoyashiki
description: Nekoyashiki Mayu is one of the four main cures in Wonderful Precure! As Cure Lillian, she forms the Nyanderful Precure duo alongside her pet cat, [Yuki](https://anilist.co/character/323118). Mayu is socially awkward and wants to befriend others but runs away from social interaction. She deeply cares for Yuki.

name: Minamoto no Raikou
description: __Height:__ 175cm Minamoto no Raikou is a Berserker-class Servant summoned by Ritsuka Fujimaru in the Grand Orders of Fate/Grand Order. She is also summoned by Leila Raidou in the Moon Holy Grail War of Fate/EXTRA CCC Fox Tail. An elegant, virtuous and glamorous woman in the prime of her youth. While a cool-headed military woman, Raikou is also a beautiful woman overflowing with tolerance. Surely the personification of maternal love. She has very long hair, which she ties at the very end.

In the anime adaptation, his hair was colored beige. Belarus and Ukraine are his sisters. name: Saki Takamine
description: Anzu's best female friend at school. She treasures her bond with Anzu as Anzu has defended her during her difficult time in middle school. She met Anzu when she was shoved down by a jealous school bully, and Anzu forced the bully to apologize. Since then, she has come to rely on Anzu to save her, and wants to support Anzu in her own way. Like Tsukasa, she is very popular, and has had to deal with unwanted advances from those around her.

name: Satsuki Yumizuka
description: [Shiki's](https://anilist.co/character/2212) classmate, who has had a crush on him since middle school. She takes a slightly larger role in Tsukihime the game and Melty Blood.

name: Shunsuke Imaizumi
description: Imaizumi is a high school freshman and a member of the Sohoku High Bicycle Club. He is an all-rounder and a logical thinker, also adored by many girls due to his good looks. His dream is to become the fastest cyclist in the world. He has a fierce rivalry with Naruko, because of his sprinting abilities and his overall attitude, and sets his goal on Kinjou, who he currently sees as his biggest obstacle as Kinjou uses this as his mentor to push Imaizumi. name: Tsubasa Katsuki
description: A serialized shounen manga artist with a boyish appearance. She will often put herself in the role of one of her characters in order to work on her manga. Because of her handsome appearance, other girls often fall in love with her, the most notable example of which is Koyume.
